title: Inscription Grammar
description: A reference-dependent series that establishes one invented glyph grammar, then applies it to map, seal, and codex artifacts without changing the symbol logic.
creative_direction: Image 01 defines a coherent fictional writing system with repeated radicals, stroke weights, and spacing rules. Images 02-04 depend on the first image as a runtime reference so the same glyph family appears across different archaeological media.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Inscription Grammar
en.description: A reference-dependent series that establishes one invented glyph grammar, then applies it to map, seal, and codex artifacts without changing the symbol logic.

zh-CN.title: 铭文语法
zh-CN.description: 先建立一套虚构字形语法，再把同一符号家族应用到地图、玉印和残页文物中。
